## Checklist

### For Skills
- [ ] Directory name is lowercase with hyphens
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid YAML front matter
- [ ] Scope, tools, workflows, rules, and completion criteria are defined
- [ ] No sensitive data (passwords, API keys, personal info)
- [ ] Tested on a real FoneClaw installation

### For Workflows
- [ ] JSON is valid
- [ ] `matchPhrases` use natural language
- [ ] Steps reference valid tool names
- [ ] No sensitive data

### For Documentation
- [ ] Links are correct and not broken
- [ ] Language is clear and concise
- [ ] Follows existing documentation style
